config.truenas.apikey_empty: Please enter an API key first.
config.truenas.apikey_save_failed: Failed to save API key to vault.
help.truenas.enabled: Enables the TrueNAS integration. The agent can manage pools, datasets, snapshots, and shares.
help.truenas.readonly: In read-only mode, the agent can only view data. All write operations are blocked.
help.truenas.allow_destructive: Allows deleting datasets, snapshots, and rollback operations.
help.truenas.use_https: Uses HTTPS for the connection to the TrueNAS server (recommended).
help.truenas.insecure_ssl: Accepts self-signed or invalid certificates (for test environments only).
help.truenas.host: Hostname or IP address of your TrueNAS server (e.g. truenas.local or 192.168.1.100).
help.truenas.api_key: API key for the TrueNAS API. Create one under System → API Keys in TrueNAS.
